name: The Bank of Toyama, Ltd.
summary: The Bank of Toyama, Ltd. provides various banking products and services to individual and business customers in Japan. It offers ordinary, time, savings, and term deposits, as well as housing, car, and education loans. The company also provides pension and insurance, NISA products, financial products brokerage, government bonds, and investment trust services; safe deposit boxes; automatic transfer and foreign currency services; and debit cards. In addition, it offers direct, internet, and mobile banking services, as well as operates 39 stores. The company was formerly known as Toyama Industrial Bank and changed its name to The Bank of Toyama, Ltd. in August 1967. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Takaoka, Japan.
